topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into ESP32. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for IoT Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: ESP32 is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing ESP32 in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given ESP32 snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of ESP32?
How does ESP32 handle memory management?
